channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Veteran Middle East CEO says business in the region is not retreating but resetting
item.description: Also includes all the latest news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Starmer quits and sets out plan for new UK PM by September
item.description: Starmer's resignation clears the way for Andy Burnham to pursue the role of successor.

item.title: As public sentiment sours, Indonesia awaits MSCI verdict which risks $13 billion in capital outflows
item.description: Indonesia's market is now among the world's worst performers, with the Jakarta Composite Index falling over 28% in 2026 so far.

item.title: NASA names all-male crew for Artemis III: what about women?
item.description: A study of 25 female astronauts reveals how high-performing women develop leadership skills through action, starting well before the workplace.
